description: Gate profile for a Node.js project WITH dependencies and a real test runner. The Gatekeeper runs `setup` (npm install) once, idempotently, before any ground-truth command — re-running only when package.json / the lockfile change (tracked via setupManifests). Same pipeline as the zero-dep `node` profile (ADR-007); only the commands differ. Tests live in separate dirs (test-freeze is directory-based; co-located *.test.js next to source is not yet supported).
